confirm_date.text: วันที่สิ้นเดือน ปัจจุบัน

last_confirm_date.text: วันที่สิ้นเดือน ยกมา

root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date , count(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no) as count_mem , pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name((extract(month from sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date))::int, 'LT' ) as confirm_month_full , pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name((extract(month from sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date))::int, 'ST' ) as confirm_month_short , extract(year from sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date)+ 543 as confirm_year
, (select count(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and extract(month from approve_date) = extract(month from '!confirm_date!'::date) and extract(year from approve_date) = extract(year from '!confirm_date!'::date) ) as count_new
, (select count(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) from sc_mem_m_resign_requestment , sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code and resign_group = 'RESIGN' and extract(month from sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_date) = extract(month from '!confirm_date!'::date) and extract(year from sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_date) = extract(year from '!confirm_date!'::date) ) as count_resign
, (select count(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) from sc_mem_m_resign_requestment , sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code and resign_group = 'DEAD' and extract(month from sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_date) = extract(month from '!confirm_date!'::date) and extract(year from sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_date) = extract(year from '!confirm_date!'::date) ) as count_dead
FROM sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type , sc_cls_confirm_data WHERE ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) AND ( ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' ) ) AND sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_cls_confirm_mem.mem_type AND sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date AND sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no AND sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' AND sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > 0 /*WHERE*/ --AND sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date = '31/05/2024' GROUP BY sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ORDER BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no

r_port_count_mem_by_month_nest_last.sql: select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date , count(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no) as count_mem , pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name((extract(month from sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date))::int, 'LT' ) as confirm_month_full , pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name((extract(month from sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date))::int, 'ST' ) as confirm_month_short , extract(year from sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date)+ 543 as confirm_year FROM sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type , sc_cls_confirm_data WHERE ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) AND ( ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' ) ) AND sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_cls_confirm_mem.mem_type AND sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date AND sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no AND sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' AND sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > 0 AND sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date = '!last_confirm_date!' /*WHERE*/ --AND sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date = '30/04/2024' GROUP BY sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ORDER BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no

r_port_count_mem_by_month_nest_cause.sql:
select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date , count(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no) as count_mem , pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name((extract(month from sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date))::int, 'LT' ) as confirm_month_full , pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name((extract(month from sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date))::int, 'ST' ) as confirm_month_short , extract(year from sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date)+ 543 as confirm_year
, (select count(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and extract(month from approve_date) = extract(month from '!confirm_date!'::date) and extract(year from approve_date) = extract(year from '!confirm_date!'::date) ) as count_new
, (select count(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) from sc_mem_m_resign_requestment , sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code and resign_group = 'RESIGN' and extract(month from sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_date) = extract(month from '!confirm_date!'::date) and extract(year from sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_date) = extract(year from '!confirm_date!'::date) ) as count_resign
, (select count(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) from sc_mem_m_resign_requestment , sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code and resign_group = 'DEAD' and extract(month from sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_date) = extract(month from '!confirm_date!'::date) and extract(year from sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_date) = extract(year from '!confirm_date!'::date) ) as count_dead
FROM sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type , sc_cls_confirm_data WHERE ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) AND ( ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' ) ) AND sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_cls_confirm_mem.mem_type AND sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date AND sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no AND sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' AND sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > 0 AND sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date = '!confirm_date!' /*WHERE*/ --AND sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date = '31/05/2024' GROUP BY sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ORDER BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no
